name: 4man
description: A four-role dev crew — Planner, parallel Coders & Testers, and a fan-out Reviewer — that builds and reviews features in the requestor's own style, run as a Claude Code agent team whose teammates coordinate through the shared task list and mailbox. Auto-engages during feature development via the '4man' skill; also exposes /4man:code-review. Needs the experimental agent-teams feature (CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS); works on your current branch, or raises a PR when shipping a new feature to an already-hosted repo.
